name: read_ucf
short_description: Import physical constraints from a file.
full_help:
read_ucf

Description: 
Import physical constraints from a file.

Syntax: 
read_ucf  [-cells <args>] [-ref <arg>] [-quiet_diff_pairs] [-quiet] [-verbose]
          <file>

Returns: 
list of added files

Usage: 
  Name                 Description
  --------------------------------
  [-cells]             Import constraints for these cells
  [-ref]               Import constraints for this ref
  [-quiet_diff_pairs]  Suppress warnings about differential pair inference 
                       when importing I/O ports
  [-quiet]             Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]           Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>               Input UCF file name

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Suppress warnings about differential pair inference when importing I/O ports
